passiveAbilities.name: Longsword
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Sage Advice
passiveAbilities.description: Friendly models within 4” may ignore Catastrophe effects.

passiveAbilities.name: Seen It All Before
passiveAbilities.description: If this character is attacker or defender in a round of melee, before each player selects their combat card, your opponent must reveal their hand.

activeAbilities.name: "Look out!"
activeAbilities.description: Target friendly character’s Evade stat is reduced by -1 until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Field Medic
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target Soldier or Noble restores X Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.
